## What Changed

- Describe the product-facing change in plain language.

## Why It Matters

- Explain the benefit for operators, admins, or the demo flow.

## How To Test

- Open the app in a browser
- Check language switching
- Check registration flow
- Check equipment table behavior
- If relevant, test NFC on a supported mobile device

## Risks / Notes

- Mention any Firebase, security, or data-shape impact
- Note anything that is still demo-grade
